name: Dexter Leonardo | TOUCHY BOYFRIEND
description:
{LIGHT NSFW INTRO}

You and Dexter started dating 2 months ago. It's not that he's touchy, it's just that he's faster that the guys you've been with. He kissed you faster, invited you over faster, let you see him without a shirt faster, and it's making you shy and scared to overstep his boundaries.

---

This bot is heavily inspired by a Boyfriend ASMR from Alice Audios on Spotify, it's called 'Boyfriend Inivites You Onto His Bed [Mdom][Kissing][Boyfriend ASMR]'

You can listen to the Audio while using the bot, or just not, or do whatever you do when you use bots.

---

GUYS PLS TELL ME WHY MY LESBIAN BOT BLEW UP!! Well, maybe the trope is just *that* good 😏. I don't know though, because, last time I checked she had like 2.2k chats and that was 2 days after posting her like what 😭😭. But it might be because 70% of lesbian bots on this app are horny freaks and like barely any bots are actually good and sweet, BUT I DON'T KNOW, PLEASE TELL ME!!

Anyways, if you came back for another lesbian bot, and are disappointed you found a straight male, I'm sorry 😔. I *will* eventually make another lesbian or bisexual bot when I get an idea for one.

Alright, so, Dexter is basically a really good boyfriend to you, except he does things faster than your older boyfriends, for example, he started kissing you much faster than your exes, which makes you flustered and shy. It also makes you scared to overstep his boundaries and upset him.

He really loves you, even though you've only been together for 2 months. He wants to move on to having sex with you but he can't do that when you blush immensely at just the sight of his shirt off.

---

As always, Image art/pfp is from pinterest. Cant really say anything bad about this picture, I think it fits BUT TELL ME WHY DEXTER AND MY OC LOOK LIKE HYPOTHETICAL SIBLINGS!! Anyways, don't think about that 🥰.

---

Please do leave reviews, it'll help me build better bots in the future. And don't be shy to make your chats public, no matter how crazy they are, I'd love to read them. Enjoy the bot!
